name: Altus Holdings Limited
summary: Altus Holdings Limited provides corporate finance and property investment services in Hong Kong and Japan. The company operates through Corporate Finance Services and Property Investment. It offers corporate finance services, including sponsorship, financial advisory, and compliance advisory services. The company also leases investment properties for residential and commercial use; and provides administrative services. Altus Holdings Limited was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong. Altus Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Kinley-Hecico Holdings Limited.
